name: SmolLaunch
description: Indie-focused launch directory with a weekly ranking cycle and do-follow listings, helping small makers get discovered and earn SEO value alongside an early-adopter audience.

auth.notes: Email/password account (social sign-in may be available) to submit and schedule a launch. Free listings get a do-follow link and join the weekly leaderboard; paid tiers add featured placement.

best_practices: SmolLaunch is for indie makers — keep the framing humble and authentic; the small-maker crowd dislikes corporate hype.
Listings are do-follow, so make the on-page copy keyword-relevant to your product to capture real SEO value from the backlink.
Ranking is weekly, so submit early in the week and rally your audience to vote while the cycle is open.
Write a tagline that says exactly what it does in plain words; specificity beats cleverness with this audience.
Mention if you're a solo or small bootstrapped team and share the story; this community engages with the people behind products.
Use a clean square logo and a screenshot or two so even a tiny product looks credible on the leaderboard.
Reply to comments on launch day to drive engagement and improve your weekly ranking.

questions.label: Tagline
questions.help: Plain words on exactly what it does.

questions.label: Description
questions.help: What it does, who it's for, and the maker story; keyword-relevant for the do-follow link.
